message:
fix(stats,lint): count status-blocked beads in stats, respect structured acceptance_criteria in lint

Stats: `blocked_issues` now reports the deduplicated union of status-blocked
and dependency-blocked beads instead of only counting dependency-graph edges.
Fixes the mismatch where `br list --status blocked` returns results but
`br stats` reports blocked_issues: 0.

Lint: `lint_issue()` now checks `issue.acceptance_criteria` before flagging
missing "Acceptance Criteria" / "Success Criteria" headings, so users no
longer need to duplicate structured field content in the description.
Includes 4 new tests covering bugs, tasks, epics, and whitespace-only edge.

Closes #211, closes #210

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
